"/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/bin/mvn" clean package -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(mkdir -p ~/.aws && cat > ~/.aws/credentials << 'EOF'
[default]
aws_access_key_id = AKIAYNYTVBJUO4ZFJHWF
aws_secret_access_key = 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
EOF
cat > ~/.aws/config << 'EOF'
[default]
region = us-east-1

Bash(\\
JAVA_HOME="/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" \\
"/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/bin/mvn" clean package -DskipTests -q && \\
echo "Build OK")

Bash(JAVA_HOME="/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" \\
"/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/bin/mvn" clean package -DskipTests -q -f /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch/pom.xml && echo "Build OK")

Bash(AWS=/Users/xwu30/Library/Python/3.8/bin/aws
VERSION="v-$\(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S\)"
JAR=/Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch/target/zilaibuy-backend-0.0.1.jar
BUCKET=elasticbeanstalk-us-east-1-579324938856
KEY="zilaibuy-backend-${VERSION}.jar"

$AWS s3 cp $JAR s3://$BUCKET/$KEY 2>&1 | tail -1 && \\
$AWS elasticbeanstalk create-application-version \\
  --application-name zilaibuy-backend \\
  --version-label $VERSION \\
  --source-bundle S3Bucket=$BUCKET,S3Key=$KEY --query "ApplicationVersion.VersionLabel" --output text && \\
$AWS elasticbeanstalk update-environment \\
  --environment-name Zilaibuy-backend-env \\
  --version-label $VERSION --query "Status" --output text)

Bash(AWS=/Users/xwu30/Library/Python/3.8/bin/aws

$AWS s3 cp /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch/target/zilaibuy-backend-0.0.1.jar s3://$BUCKET/$KEY 2>&1 | tail -1 && \\

$AWS elasticbeanstalk update-environment --environment-name Zilaibuy-backend-env --version-label $VERSION --query "Status" --output text)

Bash(export JAVA_HOME=/usr/local/opt/openjdk@17 && export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:/usr/local/opt/maven/bin:$PATH" && mvn -version 2>&1 && mvn clean package -DskipTests -q 2>&1)
Bash(find /opt -name "java" 2>/dev/null | grep -v jre | head -5; echo "---"; ls /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openjdk* 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; which mvn && mvn --version)
